ast.name: log
ast.source: LinkRange: Hooking into page-preview onHover calls
ast.target: LinkRange：挂接到 page-preview 的 onHover 调用

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Defines the separator to be used to define a link heading range. Defaults to ".." (e.g. [[Note Name#h1..h2]])
ast.target: 定义用于指定链接标题范围的分隔符。默认值为“..”（例如 [[Note Name#h1..h2]]）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether or not the end heading should be inclusive or exclusive
ast.target: 结束标题是否应为包含或排除

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add new pattern to match files in a directory. The first value will change the visual for the heading in a link. The second value will change the visual for separator. The third specifies the folder in which the files must be to match. The first match, starting bottom up, will be applied. Therefore, the first is the default pattern.
ast.target: 添加新模式以匹配目录中的文件。第一个值会改变链接中标题的显示。第二个值会改变分隔符的显示。第三个值指定需要匹配的文件所在的文件夹。从底向上开始的第一个匹配将被应用。因此，第一个是默认模式。

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 输入分隔符字符串（默认为 ..）

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Add new pattern to match files in a directory.
ast.target: 添加新模式以匹配目录中的文件。

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: This pattern is the default and cannot be completed
ast.target: 此模式为默认值，无法完成
